description_long: This is an ornate wooden cabinet or shelf with a dark brown finish and decorative gold accents. The front features an arched, intricately carved top and two open shelves, with the lower shelf slightly slanted. The sides are solid and straight, while the back is flat and unadorned, matching the overall wood texture. The structure is robust, with a wide base for stability and no visible doors or handles. The craftsmanship suggests it could be used for display or storage in a public urban setting, such as a park, plaza, or street corner.
description: A dark brown, ornately carved wooden cabinet or shelf with gold accents and two open shelves, designed for display or storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative arched top, two open shelves, and gold trim details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid, flat side panel and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, flat wooden back with the same dark finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with solid wood and gold trim.
